speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now here a period of tumultuous broils.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Away with Oxford to Hames Castle straight.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: For Somerset, off with his guilty head.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Go bear them hence. I will not hear them speak.

speaker: OXFORD
text: For my part, I’ll not trouble thee with words.

speaker: SOMERSET
text: Nor I, but stoop with patience to my fortune.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: So part we sadly in this troublous world

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: To meet with joy in sweet Jerusalem.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Is proclamation made that who finds Edward

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Shall have a high reward, and he his life?

speaker: RICHARD
text: It is, and lo where youthful Edward comes.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Bring forth the gallant; let us hear him speak.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: What, can so young a thorn begin to prick?—

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Edward, what satisfaction canst thou make

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: For bearing arms, for stirring up my subjects,

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And all the trouble thou hast turned me to?

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Speak like a subject, proud ambitious York.

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Suppose that I am now my father’s mouth:

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Resign thy chair, and where I stand, kneel thou,

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Whilst I propose the selfsame words to thee

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Which, traitor, thou wouldst have me answer to.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ah, that thy father had been so resolved!

speaker: RICHARD
text: That you might still have worn the petticoat

speaker: RICHARD
text: And ne’er have stol’n the breech from Lancaster.

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Let Aesop fable in a winter’s night;

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: His currish riddles sorts not with this place.

speaker: RICHARD
text: By heaven, brat, I’ll plague you for that word.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ay, thou wast born to be a plague to men.

speaker: RICHARD
text: For God’s sake, take away this captive scold.

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Nay, take away this scolding crookback, rather.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Peace, willful boy, or I will charm your tongue.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Untutored lad, thou art too malapert.

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: I know my duty. You are all undutiful.

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: Lascivious Edward, and thou perjured George,

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: And thou misshapen Dick, I tell you all

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: I am your better, traitors as you are,

speaker:
PRINCE
               
              EDWARD
text: And thou usurp’st my father’s right and mine.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Take that, the likeness of this railer here!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Sprawl’st thou? Take that to end thy agony!

speaker: CLARENCE
text: And there’s for twitting me with perjury.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, kill me too!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Marry, and shall.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Hold, Richard, hold, for we have done too much.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Why should she live to fill the world with words?

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: What, doth she swoon? Use means for her recovery.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Clarence, excuse me to the King my brother.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I’ll hence to London on a serious matter.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ere you come there, be sure to hear some news.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: What? What?

speaker: RICHARD
text: The Tower, the Tower!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O Ned, sweet Ned, speak to thy mother, boy.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Canst thou not speak? O traitors, murderers!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: They that stabbed Caesar shed no blood at all,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Did not offend, nor were not worthy blame,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: If this foul deed were by to equal it.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: He was a man; this, in respect, a child,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And men ne’er spend their fury on a child.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What’s worse than murderer, that I may name it?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: No, no, my heart will burst an if I speak,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And I will speak, that so my heart may burst.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Butchers and villains, bloody cannibals,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: How sweet a plant have you untimely cropped!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: You have no children, butchers. If you had,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: The thought of them would have stirred up remorse.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: But if you ever chance to have a child,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Look in his youth to have him so cut off

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: As, deathsmen, you have rid this sweet young prince.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Away with her. Go bear her hence perforce.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Nay, never bear me hence! Dispatch me here.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Here sheathe thy sword; I’ll pardon thee my death.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What, wilt thou not?—Then, Clarence, do it thou.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: By heaven, I will not do thee so much ease.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Good Clarence, do! Sweet Clarence, do thou do it.

speaker: CLARENCE
text: Didst thou not hear me swear I would not do it?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ay, but thou usest to forswear thyself.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: ’Twas sin before, but now ’tis charity.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What, wilt thou not? Where is that devil’s butcher, Richard,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Hard-favored Richard? Richard, where art thou?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou art not here. Murder is thy alms-deed;

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Petitioners for blood thou ne’er putt’st back.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text:
Away, I say!
                 
                (
                To
                 
                Soldiers
                .
                )
               I charge you bear her hence.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: So come to you and yours as to this prince!

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Where’s Richard gone?

speaker: CLARENCE
text: To London all in post, and, as I guess,

speaker: CLARENCE
text: To make a bloody supper in the Tower.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: He’s sudden if a thing comes in his head.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: Now march we hence. Discharge the common sort

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: With pay and thanks, and let’s away to London

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: And see our gentle queen how well she fares.

speaker:
KING
               
              EDWARD
text: By this I hope she hath a son for me.
